news.headline: Global stocks plunge as Trump tariff shock hits markets. Asia, Europe markets tumble, Wall Street set to extend losses. Allies, foes assess impact.
news.summary: Stock markets in Asia and Europe experienced significant drops in their values, with the trend expected to continue as Wall Street prepares to open. Investors globally are closely monitoring the situation as they assess potential strategies in response to the market downturn.

news.headline: ECB Account: Outlook for exports a is major concern.
ECB Account: Both a cut and a pause are on the table in April.
In 1930, golfer Bobby Jones made history by winning the Grand Slam, a feat unmatched in golf.
news.summary: In 1930, golfer Bobby Jones achieved a remarkable feat in the sport that has yet to be matched by anyone else. Jones' performance not only made history but also significantly elevated the status of The Masters Tournament, turning it into a globally recognized event. This accomplishment solidified Jones' legacy in golf and continues to be celebrated by fans and players worldwide.

news.headline: Article discusses importance of setting adaptable goals. Emphasizes forces beyond control impacting progress. From Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Setting goals and working towards your dreams is important, however, unforeseen circumstances can hinder your advancement. It is crucial to adapt to changing circumstances in order to stay on course towards achieving your aspirations. Remember, flexibility is key in navigating through unexpected challenges.

news.headline: ECB Account: Few wanted to avoid signaling further rate cuts.
Accuray CyberKnife® benefits CNS tumors; studies present at meeting. Advances for quality care, expanding options.
news.summary: Accuray Incorporated (NASDAQ: ARAY) has recently disclosed new data on the advancements made using the CyberKnife System in healthcare. These innovations have enabled high-quality care to become accessible to a broader population, particularly those with limited healthcare options. The data, released on April 3, 2025, showcases the positive impact of these clinical developments. Accuray Incorporated continues to lead the way in healthcare technology, offering groundbreaking solutions that are revolutionizing patient care.

news.headline: Alterity Therapeutics to present positive ATH434 Phase 2 trial results at AAN 2025 Annual Meeting in San Diego.
news.summary: Alterity Therapeutics, a biotech firm focusing on disease-modifying treatments for neurodegenerative conditions, revealed its plans to present at the American Academy of Neurology 2025 Annual Meeting in San Diego, CA. The company will deliver an oral presentation and present a poster on its clinical programs for Multiple System Atrophy (MSA). The event, scheduled from April 5 to April 9, 2025, will be a platform for Alterity to showcase its advancements. The firm's dual listing on ASX and NASDAQ under the tickers ATH and ATHE respectively, highlights its global presence and commitment to innovation in the field.

news.headline: Tiktok faces fine over €500 million for EU data sent to China.
ISI buys back ISK 2.880 million nominal of ICESEA 25 06 bonds at a price of 100,8715 per bond after auction. Settlement on April 7, 2025.
news.summary: During ISI’s bond auction for ICESEA 28 10, holders of ICESEA 25 06 were given the opportunity to sell their holdings at a fixed clean price of 100,8715 in exchange for subscriptions in the auction. This resulted in ISI repurchasing ISK 2.880 million in nominal value of ICESEA 25 06. The settlement for this exchange is scheduled for April 7th, 2025, and the offering process is being overseen by Arion Bank Capital Markets.

news.headline: 101 Mobility partners with Welcome Home Angel to transform homes for children with special healthcare needs in Wilmington, N.C. - April 3, 2025.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina, on April 3, 2025, 101 Mobility, a prominent provider of mobility and accessibility solutions nationwide, has revealed a recent collaboration with Welcome Home Angel, a nonprofit focused on renovating the homes of children dealing with chronic illnesses.

news.headline: ECB Account: No longer clear whether policy still restrictive.
ECB Accounts: It was argued that it was no longer possible to be confident that monetary policy was restrictive.
SCIVAX+TSLC develop world's smallest PPG sensor head, to be presented at Touch Taiwan exhibition.
news.summary: In Kawasaki, Japan, SCIVAX Corporation and TSLC Corporation, a subsidiary of SemiLEDs Corporation (NASDAQ: LEDS), have collaborated to create the smallest PPG sensor head globally. This innovative technology will debut at the "Touch Taiwan" display-related technology exhibition in Taipei. SCIVAX, led by President Satoru Tanaka, unveiled this breakthrough, showcasing their capabilities in miniaturization and sensor development. The partnership aims to revolutionize the field of PhotoPlethysmoGraphy with this groundbreaking sensor design, marking a significant advancement in the industry's capabilities.

news.headline: PAR Tech celebrates leaders in loyalty with the sixth annual PAR Punchh Customer Awards. Brands recognized for delivering outstanding personalization and engagement to boost customer lifetime value.
news.summary: ParTech, Inc. disclosed the winners of the sixth annual PAR Punchh® Customer Awards, showcasing brands that achieved excellence in 1:1 personalization and engagement to enhance customer lifetime value. The global restaurant technology company recognized businesses that excelled in this area, setting new benchmarks. This year's awards honored those who demonstrated outstanding performance in catering to individual customer needs, resulting in enhanced customer loyalty and satisfaction. The remarkable achievements of these brands were acknowledged for their significant impact on driving customer engagement and increasing customer lifetime value.

news.headline: ECB Account: Inflation uncertainty could unfold either way.
ECB Accounts: The combination of US tariffs and retaliation measures could also pose upside risks to inflation.
Credit risk for US investment grade climbs most since August.
ECB Accounts: Significant expansion of fiscal policy linked to defence had the potential to derail the disinflation process.
ECB Accounts: Uncertainty called for caution in policy-setting and especially in communication.

Richard Quesnel, CEO of Consolidated Lithium Metals Inc., acquires 10M units for $0.01 each, totaling $100K. His ownership now stands at 28.87M Common Shares, representing 7.42% of outstanding shares (non-diluted).
news.summary: Richard Quesnel, CEO of Consolidated Lithium Metals Inc., purchased 10,000,000 units of the company at $0.01 each, costing $100,000. Each unit includes one common share and half a share purchase warrant. Before this, Quesnel owned 18,873,000 common shares, 9,000,000 warrants, and 5,000,000 options, making up 5.12% of the outstanding shares non-diluted and 8.60% diluted. After the transaction, he now owns 28,873,000 shares, 14,000,000 warrants, and 5,000,000 options, accounting for 7.42% of outstanding shares non-diluted and 11.72% diluted.

news.headline: MariMed's Betty's Eddies introduces THC & CBG-infused Caramel Chews to expand its top-selling brand.
news.summary: Betty's Eddies, a product line under MariMed, has broadened its popular brand by launching new THC and CBG-infused caramel chews. This expansion aims to cater to a wider consumer base seeking edibles with additional cannabinoids. The move comes as part of MariMed's strategy to diversify its offerings and capitalize on the growing demand for cannabis-infused products. The caramel chews are expected to attract customers looking for alternative consumption methods, especially those interested in the therapeutic benefits of cannabinoids. This development demonstrates MariMed's commitment to innovation and market expansion in the cannabis industry.

news.headline: Incannex Healthcare finishes Phase 2 enrollment for RePOSA trial of IHL-42X for sleep apnea, awaiting Phase 2 data by H1 2025.
news.summary: Anticipated to be released in the initial half of 2025, the top-line results from Phase 2 clinical trials are eagerly awaited. This significant data is set to provide crucial insights into the efficacy and safety of the treatment being examined. Stakeholders and experts are looking forward to analyzing the outcomes and determining the next steps based on the data. The findings from this phase hold immense importance as they will influence the decision-making process moving forward in the development and potential approval of the product.

news.headline: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings to acquire Thrive Skilled Pediatric Care, deal expected to close in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAH) based in Atlanta revealed on April 3, 2025, that it will acquire Thrive Skilled Pediatric Care. Thrive SPC focuses on providing care to medically complex and high-cost patient populations. The agreement is set to finalize in the second quarter of 2025 pending regular regulatory clearances. This strategic move signifies Aveanna's goal to enhance its diversified home care platform and expand its reach in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Intellia Therapeutics doses first patient in MAGNITUDE-2 Phase 3 trial of gene editing treatment for ATTRv-PN.
news.summary: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent gene editing company listed on NASDAQ (NTLA), recently disclosed that they have initiated the dosing of the inaugural patient in the MAGNITUDE-2 trial on April 3, 2025. This pivotal Phase 3 trial is being conducted worldwide and focuses on assessing the efficacy of their drug, nexiguran ziclumeran (nex-z), in treating hereditary ATTR amyloidosis with polyneuropathy (ATTRv-PN). With this milestone advancement, Intellia continues its innovation in leveraging CRISPR-based therapies to transform the medical field.

news.headline: Serve Robotics launches autonomous delivery in Dallas-Fort Worth via Uber Eats, plans to deploy 2,000 robots in the US by 2025.
news.summary: Serve Robotics Inc. unveiled the commencement of its autonomous sidewalk delivery service in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area. Partnering with Uber Eats, a delivery platform under Uber Technologies Inc., Serve's deployment marks a significant advancement in their objective to introduce 2,000 AI-driven delivery robots nationwide by the conclusion of 2025.

news.headline: Top Kingwin Ltd's subsidiary plans to launch Desktop Robot 1.0, blending AI with emotional interaction for a smarter office.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on April 3, 2025, Top Kingwin Ltd (NASDAQ: WAI) shared exciting news that its subsidiary, Shenzhen Tiancheng Chuangxin Technology Co., Ltd. ("Chuangxin Tech"), is gearing up to launch its self-created Desktop Robot 1.0. This cutting-edge offering will combine artificial intelligence (AI) with emotional interaction to provide a more intelligent and empathetic office and lifestyle encounter.

news.headline: Jayud Global Logistics responds to market activity on April 1-2; a leading logistics provider based in Shenzhen.
news.summary: Based in Shenzhen, Jayud Global Logistics Limited (NASDAQ: JYD), a prominent end-to-end supply chain solution provider, specializing in cross-border logistics, recently addressed the market movements on April 1 and April 2.

news.headline: FTI Consulting (NYSE: FCN) to release Q1 2025 results on April 24, 2025, before NY market opens.
news.summary: FTI Consulting, Inc. (NYSE: FCN) revealed plans to disclose first-quarter financial results as of March 31, 2025, before the New York market commences on Thursday, April 24, 2025.

news.headline: ECB Accounts: Being prudent in the face of uncertainty did not necessarily equate to being gradual in adjusting the interest rate.
ECB Accounts: These factors could increase the risk of undershooting the inflation target in the medium term.
ECB Accounts: The point was made that the likely shocks on the horizon, including from escalating trade tensions, and uncertainty more generally, risked significantly weighing on growth.
ProVen Growth & Income VCT plc issued new equity shares worth £5 million.
Pony.ai Europe receives Luxembourg testing permit for Level 4 autonomous driving; subsidiary of global leader Pony.ai.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on April 3, 2025, Pony.ai Europe, the European sector of the prominent autonomous driving firm Pony.ai (NASDAQ: PONY), secured a Level 4 autonomous driving scientific testing permit from Luxembourg's Ministry of Mobility and Public Works. This advancement marks a significant achievement for the company in expanding their autonomous driving capabilities in the European market.

news.headline: Conagra Brands released Q3 2025 results: net sales totaled $3.2B, 12% increase YoY. #CAGstocks #Q3results
news.summary: In Chicago on April 3, 2025, Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE: CAG) shared its third-quarter fiscal year 2025 results ending on February 23, 2025. Compared to the previous year's fiscal period, the company reported highlights in net sales, with specific numbers undisclosed.

news.headline: V2X, Inc. (NYSE: VVX) reprices $238M Term Loan A and $500M Revolving Credit Facility, no outstanding borrowings reported.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia on April 3, 2025, V2X, Inc. (NYSE: VVX) revealed the successful repricing and extension of its $238 million Term Loan A along with the $500 million Revolving Credit Facility. By December 31, 2024, the company had no borrowings outstanding.

news.headline: Ballard Power Systems to discuss Q1 2025 results in a conference call on May 6th at 8:00 a.m. PT.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 3, 2025, Ballard Power Systems (NASDAQ: BLDP) (TSX: BLDP) announced their scheduled conference call on Tuesday, May 6th, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. PDT (11:00 a.m. EDT) to discuss their first quarter 2025 operating performance. The call will be live, and individuals can join by dialing in at the specified time.

news.headline: US Challenger Layoffs Actual 275.240k (Forecast -, Previous 172.017k)
G-P named top global leader in the 2025 SPARK Matrix for EOR solutions by QKS Group for AI innovation and compliance.
news.summary: Boston-based company G-P (Globalization Partners) has been acknowledged for its excellence in AI innovation, strong compliance infrastructure, top-tier partner network and integrations, as well as exceptional customer support. This recognition was received on April 3, 2025, under the banner of a "Remote First Company". G-P is renowned as a key player in the industry, with commendable numbers supporting their position as a leader in the market.

news.headline: Trevi Therapeutics to join investor conferences in April; developing Haduvio™ for chronic cough in IPF patients (Nasdaq: TRVI).
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in New Haven, Connecticut, Trevi Therapeutics, Inc. unveiled its progress as a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company. Listed on Nasdaq as TRVI, the company is dedicated to advancing Haduvio™, an oral nalbuphine ER therapy. This treatment is specifically designed for individuals suffering from chronic cough linked to idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF).

news.headline: MEXC lists StakeStone (STO), offering 130,000 USDT airdrop+ rewards, on spot and futures markets.
news.summary: Victoria, Seychelles - April 3, 2025 - MEXC, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency exchange, has added StakeStone (STO) to its spot and futures markets on April 3, 2025 (UTC). In celebration of this listing, MEXC has initiated a special Airdrop + event.

news.headline: OPEC+ agrees to make larger than expected supply hike in May.
ProVen VCT plc has issued a total of 3 million new shares.
25% tariff on US auto imports imposed by Trump increases costs. Source: Bloomberg.
Putin said to see Trump as able to deliver Ukraine concessions.
ETI acquires AeroMaritime Mediterranean from ITP Aero, a leader in aircraft engine MRO services.
news.summary: Montreal-based Essential Turbines Inc. (ETI) has disclosed on April 3, 2025 that it has finalized a deal with ITP Aero, a prominent aerospace propulsion firm. ETI, specializing in maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services for aircraft engines, has agreed to acquire...

news.headline: L.L.Bean partners with Boston Red Sox to release limited-edition Fenway Tarp Tote made from Red Sox infield rain tarp.
news.summary: Inspired by the iconic L.L.Bean Boat and Tote, the Fenway Tarp Tote is crafted from the Red Sox infield rain tarp. The collaboration between the beloved New England team and renowned outfitter has resulted in this unique product. The tote is a representation of the strong bond between the two entities and is set to be a sought-after item for fans. The tote is set to be launched on April 3, 2025, in Freeport, Maine. This partnership brings together the rich heritage of both the Red Sox and L.L.Bean, combining sports and fashion in a durable and stylish accessory. Fans and enthusiasts can now own a piece of history with this exclusive Fenway Tarp Tote.

news.headline: OPEC+ plans to increase 411k bpd in April - Statement.
OPEC+ countries agree to the increment originally planned for May in addition to two monthly increments.
The eight OPEC+ countries will meet on the 5th of May to decide on June production levels.
